steps.name: When user opens facebook  portal link "https://www.facebook.com/"
Then User should see the  page title "Facebook - log in or sign up"
When User enters Username as "Valid" and Password as "Valid"
Then User clicks on Login button with expected status as "Pass"
Then User should see the Facebook Home page on successful login status "Pass"
